title: Ultimate Elemental Swords
description: Unleash Elemental Swords⚔️: wield 🔥Fire, 🔥Blue Fire, 💧Water, 🌪️Air, 🌍Earth, 🌿Plant, ❄️Ice & ⚡Lightning blades—each triggering blazing blasts, freezing cages, quakes, poison clouds, gusts and thunderstorms with dazzling particles!
body:
✨ ELEMENTAL SWORDS ✨
Version 1.5.0 Update - THE VOID AWAKENS

Harness the power of darkness with the all-new VOID SWORD!

The most powerful sword in the addon has arrived. Create a massive black hole that appears 8 blocks in front of you, pulling all nearby enemies into its gravitational grasp. Watch as entities are relentlessly attracted toward the void's center, then witness a spectacular explosion that launches them in all directions when the effect ends!

Void Sword Features:
🌌 Black Hole Creation - Spawns a stationary void rift 8 blocks ahead
🧲 Gravitational Pull - Constantly attracts entities within 15 blocks
⚫ Dense Core - Pulsating center with multiple particle effects
💫 Expanding Sphere - Growing particle rings (radius: 2→6 blocks)
🌀 Spiral Particles - Rotating void and portal particles
💥 Explosive Finale - Launches all trapped entities after 30 seconds
🎯 Tactical Placement - Set and forget while you reposition
⚡ Powerful Effects - Inflicts Blindness, Wither, and Slowness
🔥 Fire Sword

Ignite the area in roaring flames with every swing—your enemies will burn as embers dance around you. 🔥🔥🔥

🔥 Blue Fire Sword

Twice the blaze of red fire, twice the devastation. Watch as an icy-blue inferno erupts, leaving nothing but scorched earth. ❄️🔥❄️

💧 Water Sword

Drench foes in a torrent of slowness—every strike drips with chilling weight, trapping them in viscous bubbles of despair. 🌊⏳

🌪️ Air Sword

Float on the wind—then catapult mobs skyward! Feel the gale-force pushback as tornado particles swirl in your wake. ☁️💨

🌍 Earth Sword

Summon a massive earthquake; the ground trembles, mobs are shattered and sent flying in a cloud of dust and rubble. 🪨🌋

🌿 Plant Sword

Release a toxic bloom—vines writhe, spores drift, and foes succumb to poison as emerald particles swirl. 🌱☠️

❄️ Ice Sword

Encase enemies in crystalline cages of frost—watch them freeze solid amidst sparkling snowflakes. 🧊❄️

⚡ Lightning Sword

Call down a storm of bolts—⚡crackling arcs strike all around, electrifying the air in a neon flash. ⚡⚡⚡

 🌌  Void Sword

 Void Sword - (NEW!) Creates a black hole that attracts and explodes enemies 🌌

Particle Extravaganza:
Every blade unleashes a unique spectacle—embers, droplets, dust, spores, snowflakes and lightning arcs fuse into an epic light show!
